list.title: My events
list.empty: You don't have any events yet. Create your first one.

dashboard.notFound: This event does not exist or is not available.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel event
cancelDialog.description: The event will move to cancelled status. This action cannot be undone.

deleteDialog.title: Delete draft
deleteDialog.description: The draft will be removed from your list. Only draft events can be deleted.

create.title: Create event
create.currencyLock: The currency is locked once the event is created.
create.confirmHint: Review the details and create the event. It will be a draft.

edit.title: Edit event
edit.currencyImmutable: The currency cannot be changed after the event is created.
edit.terminalBlocked: Completed or cancelled events cannot be edited.

validation.dateFormat: The date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format.
validation.budgetInvalid: Enter a valid amount (up to 2 decimals).
validation.guestsInvalid: Enter a valid number of guests.
validation.guestsMin: There must be at least 1 guest.
validation.guestsMax: The number of guests is too high.

errors.UNEXPECTED: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please review the details you entered.
errors.NOT_FOUND: This event does not exist or is not available.
errors.INVALID_STATE: The action is not valid for the event's current status.
